summary: Implemented believable fake name generation for the 404 Museum project. Created three new files: name fragment datasets organized by archetype (airline, OS vendor, media startup, MMORPG guild, webmail, e-commerce, forum, personal homepage) with German-flavored fragments for de-de region blending; a name generator that combines fragments using archetype-appropriate patterns with brand safety filtering against a 16-entry denylist; and a barrel export. Updated the data index to export the new modules. All 174 tests pass (45 US-007 tests including 29 snapshots), plus lint and typecheck clean.
